seo.title: GPT Image 2 - Text-to-Image & Editing | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Generate and edit images with GPT Image 2 in MaxVideoAI. Text-to-image, image-to-image, image-size presets, custom size, quality levels, output formats, and optional mask URL control.

overview: GPT Image 2 is a quality-first image model inside MaxVideoAI. One Image Lab entry covers text-to-image and image-to-image, with image-size presets, custom width/height, quality, number of outputs, output format, and mask URL when an edit needs a constrained region.

hero.title: GPT Image 2 - quality-first image generation and edits
hero.intro: Image generation for crisp typography, photoreal product shots, UI mockups, infographics, and controlled reference edits.
hero.badge: Text -> Image · Image -> Image · Low / Medium / High quality

items.title: Readable text in ads, posters, and infographics

promptStructure.title: Prompt mini-guide
promptStructure.quote: Scene, subject, important details, use case, constraints, and for edits: change this while preserving that.
promptStructure.description: GPT Image 2 rewards structured prompts. Separate scene, subject, composition, text that must appear, and edit constraints. For text-heavy images, write exact copy and describe where it belongs.
steps: Exact text or labels to render
Materials, lighting, camera feel, and style
Use case such as product photo, UI screen, poster, or infographic
Constraints for edits, masks, and preserved elements

tips.title: Tips and limits
items: Use High quality for final typography, packaging, and photoreal product shots.
Use Low or Medium for cheaper layout exploration before final renders.
Use auto image size in Edit mode when the source image should drive the output frame.
For custom sizes, keep dimensions divisible by 16, max edge 3840px, and total area between 655,360 and 8,294,400 pixels.
Add a mask URL only when the edit must stay inside a specific region.

prompts.title: Packaging campaign still
prompts.prompt: A premium catalog product photo of a coffee bag labeled "Summit Roast", mountain artwork, readable tasting notes, rustic wooden table, soft morning light, shallow depth of field.

prompts.title: Infographic with precise labels
prompts.prompt: A clean editorial infographic titled "Creator Launch Checklist", 12 labeled modules, crisp typography, white background, precise spacing, subtle blue and graphite accents.

prompts.title: Reference product edit
prompts.prompt: Keep the exact product shape and label hierarchy from the reference, replace the background with a bright e-commerce tabletop scene, remove distracting reflections, preserve readable text.

faqs.q: Does GPT Image 2 support text-to-image and image-to-image?
faqs.a: Yes. MaxVideoAI exposes GPT Image 2 as one Image Lab entry with Create and Edit modes.

The Image Lab exposes image_size presets, canonical sizes 1024x768, 1024x1024, 1024x1536, 1920x1080, 2560x1440, and 3840x2160, a Custom width/height mode, quality, num_images, output_format, reference image inputs for edits, and optional mask_url.

faqs.q: How much does GPT Image 2 cost?
faqs.a: Image cost depends on quality and size, but MaxVideoAI shows the exact live quote before generation. Use the pricing card and app quote as the customer-facing price.

pricingNotes: Image costs vary by quality and size. MaxVideoAI shows the final display price before generation; use the app quote for customer-facing estimates.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for text-heavy images, product photography, UI mockups, and controlled edits.
custom.heroDesc1: GPT Image 2 is built for high-fidelity stills where text rendering, product detail, and prompt adherence matter more than raw speed.
custom.heroDesc2: In MaxVideoAI it runs in the Image Lab as one model entry for Create and Edit, with shared wallet, reusable references, quality controls, and live pricing before you run.
heroHighlights: Readable text||Use it for posters, labels, infographics, and UI screens that need clean typography.
Product fidelity||Strong fit for packaging, catalog shots, and e-commerce images with visible labels.
Image controls||Image size preset or custom width/height, quality, output format, and mask URL are available in the Image Lab.
Unified image workflow||Switch between Create and Edit without leaving the Image Lab.
custom.whatIntro1: Select GPT Image 2, choose Create or Edit, set image count, image size, quality, and output format, then run from the same wallet as your other image models.
custom.whatIntro2: For edits, add reference images. Add a mask URL only when the transformation should be constrained to a specific area.
whatFlowSteps: Select GPT Image 2 in the Image Lab
Pick image size, quality, number of outputs, and output format
Add references and an optional mask URL for edits
Check the live price chip and launch
custom.tipsIntro: GPT Image 2 performs best when the prompt separates subject, composition, exact text, and constraints.
strengths: Use High quality for typography and product-final renders.
Use Low or Medium for cheaper layout exploration.
For edit prompts, write what should change and what must remain unchanged.
When using a mask URL, keep the mask public and aligned with the source image.
boundaries: The MaxVideoAI composer currently allows up to 4 outputs per request.
Edit mode requires at least one reference image.
safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing, or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.
Do not include private personal data or sensitive documents.

decisionCards.title: GPT Image 2 or Nano Banana 2?
decisionCards.body: Use GPT Image 2 for text-heavy stills and controlled edits. Use Nano Banana 2 for broader ratios and grounded Google image workflows.

decisionCards.title: Working on product text?
decisionCards.body: Write the exact label hierarchy, lighting, camera angle and edit constraints before generating.

decisionCards.title: Need cleaner source control?
decisionCards.body: Prepare the product source, mask or exact text hierarchy first, then render or edit the final still in GPT Image 2.

referenceWorkflows.title: Text-to-image
referenceWorkflows.body: Specify subject, exact text, layout, lighting, lens and output size.

referenceWorkflows.title: Image edit
referenceWorkflows.body: Upload the source image and describe what should change and what must stay locked.

referenceWorkflows.title: Mask-guided edit
referenceWorkflows.body: Use a mask only when an edit should be constrained to a specific region.

referenceWorkflows.title: Quality choice
referenceWorkflows.body: Draft lower, then switch to high when typography or product detail matters.

referenceWorkflows.title: Batch variants
referenceWorkflows.body: Generate multiple images for composition exploration before selecting a final.

section.title: How to write a strong GPT Image 2 prompt
section.intro: Use structured prompts with scene, subject, exact text, visual details, use case, and constraints.
section.tip: Tip: put exact words in quotation marks and describe where each text block should appear.
section.referencesTitle: How GPT Image 2 uses sources and masks

globalPrinciples: State the target artifact: poster, product photo, UI screen, infographic, or concept frame.
Give exact text when typography matters.
For edits, separate preserve instructions from change instructions.
engineWhy: The model is especially useful when text and layout accuracy are part of the image brief.
Quality affects cost, so draft cheaper and rerun approved frames at High.
Reference edits improve when each source image has a clear role.

imageExamples.title: GPT Image 2 image prompt examples
imageExamples.intro: GPT Image 2 prompts for readable text, product stills, UI mockups, controlled edits, masks and 4K finals.

items.title: Product still with readable label
items.prompt: Catalog product photo of a premium coffee bag titled "SUMMIT ROAST", readable tasting notes, light wood table, soft daylight, clean framing, e-commerce background.

items.title: Exact-text poster
items.prompt: Vertical 4K poster with exact title "CREATOR LAUNCH CHECKLIST", 8 numbered modules, crisp typography, white background, navy and cyan accents, even margins.

items.title: UI mockup
items.prompt: 1920x1080 SaaS analytics dashboard screen mockup, white cards, left navigation, readable headings, realistic metrics, premium product UI style.

items.title: Controlled image edit
items.prompt: Using this product image, preserve shape, label, proportions and main reflection. Replace the background with a bright studio, remove dust and distracting reflections.

items.title: Mask-guided edit
items.prompt: Modify only the masked region: replace the secondary copy with "LIMITED RESERVE", keep logo, packaging color, shadow and perspective unchanged.

items.title: 4K hero still
items.prompt: 4K product-page hero still, black smartphone on graphite surface, readable screen text, controlled reflection, premium studio lighting, negative space on the right.
